text:
event Swap(
    address indexed sender,
    uint amount0In,
    uint amount1In,
    uint amount0Out,
    uint amount1Out,
    address indexed to
);

event BridgehubDepositInitiated(
    uint256 indexed chainId,
    bytes32 indexed txDataHash,
    address indexed from,
    bytes32 assetId,
    bytes bridgeMintCalldata
);
